activity_summary: A field operations manager assigns, reschedules, or escalates a repair visit using route, parts, and SLA constraints.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Repair visit V-2187 should return to dispatch support for the missing gate code before Reyes is assigned within the four-hour SLA window.

surface.heading: Repair visit dispatch review

selected.request: Kitchen freezer repair needs dispatch before the service window closes.

info.label: Technician
info.value: Reyes is qualified for the freezer unit.

info.label: Parts readiness
info.value: Replacement fan motor is available at the west depot.

info.label: Timing constraint
info.value: Dispatch within the four-hour SLA window.

evidence: Technician Reyes is 18 minutes from the site and certified for the freezer unit.
Replacement fan motor is available at the west depot.
Customer gate code is missing before dispatch.
surface.policy: Same-day SLA visits can be assigned when parts and site access are confirmed; missing access details return to dispatch support.
actions: Assign Reyes after access is confirmed
Escalate SLA risk if access is not resolved in time

handoff.title: Site access follow-up
handoff.reason: Gate code is missing before the qualified technician can be assigned.
handoff.action: Request the gate code, then assign Reyes within the SLA window.
